title: 菊花賞の後に・静かなる宣言

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower, overcome with emotion after
winning the Kikuka Sho, is confronted by Mihono
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Frustrated by her loss, Bourbon acknowledges
Rice Shower as her rival and challenges her to
another face off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower accepts the challenge and, in a voice
loud enough for the audience to hear, declares
she will win the next race as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to enter the Nikkei Sho so that her
abilities can continue to bloom.
